title: L3 cycle.complete Payload
description: Emitted after the logger phase exits success. Marks the cycle terminal-success state. The presence of cycle.complete with a given cycle_id is the idempotency gate: a subsequent invocation with the same cycle_id no-ops. cycle-098 Sprint 3A.

phases_completed.description: All 5 phases must have completed successfully for cycle.complete to be emitted.

outcome.description: cycle.complete is the success-only terminal event. Errors emit cycle.error instead.

budget_actual_usd.description: If logger phase reported actual cost in stdout, it is propagated here for L2 reconciliation.
